title: Hunting Phishing Emails in Microsoft Sentinel with KQL
summary: Step-by-step walkthrough of the KQL queries I use to detect phishing campaigns in Sentinel — suspicious sender domains, unusual send patterns, and clickthrough analysis.

title: Mapping a Real Incident to MITRE ATT&CK
summary: Walking through a real-world incident at Smart Tech and showing how to map every observed technique to MITRE ATT&CK — turning the mapping into Sigma detection rules.

title: Conditional Access in Practice
summary: Designing and rolling out Conditional Access policies across multiple M365 tenants — MFA enforcement, location filtering, device compliance, and break-glass account gotchas.
